aries.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aries today.
aries.deploy_today: Maybe — the cosmos are unreadable, which means so is your diff.
aries.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. Your Slack is not. It was never going to be.

taurus.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Taurus today.
taurus.deploy_today: Yes — nothing will go wrong today, and that should worry you more than if it did.
taurus.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. Someone will still ping you in a deleted channel. They always do.

gemini.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Gemini today.
gemini.deploy_today: No — you'll get distracted halfway through and forget to write the rollback plan.
gemini.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. You will start four tasks and finish zero. This is called momentum.

cancer.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Cancer today.
cancer.deploy_today: Maybe — the stars are quiet. Quiet is historically ominous around deploy time.
cancer.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. So is your CI pipeline. That is not the same kind of quiet.

leo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Leo today.
leo.deploy_today: No — you will deploy anyway, it will break something, and it will absolutely become your origin story.
leo.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. Your pull request has fourteen comments. The cosmos have not seen your PR.

virgo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Virgo today.
virgo.deploy_today: Yes — you have tested this eleven times. You know what you're doing. Ship it.
virgo.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. You will refactor something that worked perfectly fine. It won't afterwards.

libra.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Libra today.
libra.deploy_today: No — you will spend the entire deploy window deciding whether to deploy.
libra.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. You will spend three hours picking a variable name. Worth it, though.

scorpio.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Scorpio today.
scorpio.deploy_today: No — you already know what you did. Don't push it to prod and hope nobody notices.
scorpio.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. That's not what the logs say. The logs are never quiet. The logs know.

sagittarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Sagittarius today.
sagittarius.deploy_today: No — if you're this scattered, the blast radius will be legendary. Let it marinate.
sagittarius.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. Your sprint board is not. Your sprint board is never quiet. That's a sprint board.

capricorn.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Capricorn today.
capricorn.deploy_today: Maybe — your checklist says yes. Your gut says no. Your gut has three years of prod incidents.
capricorn.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. Your manager just scheduled a quick sync with no agenda. It will not be quick.

aquarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aquarius today.
aquarius.deploy_today: Yes — you've been thinking about this for two weeks. At some point thinking becomes procrastinating.
aquarius.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. That's not what the error logs say. The error logs have opinions. Loud ones.

pisces.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today.
pisces.deploy_today: Maybe — your instincts are feeling dreamy today. So is your rollback plan. That's a problem.
pisces.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. You will dream of clean architecture and wake up to a 900-line component. Same as always.
